title: Teammate Load Records
description: Hook-appended per-tool-event load telemetry (.excn/load_progress.json, EXEC-045/ADR-0006). The load-report hook appends one record per PostToolUse firing when load_reporting is enabled, keeping a rolling window of the newest records (bounded growth). In the *_progress.json ignore class (ADR-0005); the status-page viewer reads it to render per-Teammate load.

agent_type.description: Actor identity from the hook payload's agent_type ('unknown' when absent).

agent_id.description: Subagent instance id when the payload carries one; omitted otherwise.
